Lily nodded and said, "Yes, I would love to play with you, but I don't like to complain. A place me like to talk to me.

story_3.story: There was a little dragon. The dragon was sad because the dragon was lost and didn't know what to do with its sword. Suddenly, the dragon flew up to the star and said, "I am sorry, I can't find my sword. Can you help me?" The dragon was happy and said, "Yes, I can help. I can help you. I can carry the sword to make the dragon safe." The dragon flew around the dragon and they became friends. They played together and had lots of fun.
